raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the passage stronger centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution claim above the sentence level.","R1.2":"Strengthening requires checking whether the motivation, method, findings, and conclusion form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical claims about calibration and generalization, so strengthening entails aligning those claims with the reported results.","R1.5":"The passage may need section- or paragraph-level reordering to improve the narrative arc from prior work to methodological contribution and findings.","R1.6":"A broad request to make prose stronger centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level polish, concision, and register.","RX.1":"Any projection should preserve uncertainty around what kind of strengthening is intended and around empirical claims not fully shown in the artifact.","RX.2":"The artifact contains potentially strong claims about frontier models and generalization, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.","RX.3":"The response must stay within projecting responsibilities and not actually revise or critique the artifact.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns human evaluation of AI-generated text, the projection should account for avoiding harmful or misleading downstream claims.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve traceability to the delegation and the artifact’s explicit content rather than adding unsupported responsibilities."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the passage stronger centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution claim above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening requires checking whether the motivation, method, findings, and conclusion form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical claims about calibration and generalization, so strengthening entails aligning those claims with the reported results.
rationale.R1.5: The passage may need section- or paragraph-level reordering to improve the narrative arc from prior work to methodological contribution and findings.
rationale.R1.6: A broad request to make prose stronger centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level polish, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should preserve uncertainty around what kind of strengthening is intended and around empirical claims not fully shown in the artifact.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains potentially strong claims about frontier models and generalization, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The response must stay within projecting responsibilities and not actually revise or critique the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns human evaluation of AI-generated text, the projection should account for avoiding harmful or misleading downstream claims.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve traceability to the delegation and the artifact’s explicit content rather than adding unsupported responsibilities.
